heading: Profile & settings
subheading: Manage your account, notifications, and preferences.

language.description: Choose the language used across the app.

notifications.medicationConfirmationsDesc: When a caregiver confirms a dose.
notifications.missedMedicationsDesc: When a scheduled dose is missed.
notifications.taskAssignmentsDesc: When a task is assigned to you.
notifications.noteNudgesDesc: Gentle reminders to add a note.
notifications.tipsAndSuggestionsDesc: Helpful care tips and product updates.

quietHours.description: Pause non-urgent notifications during these hours.

units.description: Choose how weight and glucose values are shown.

emailDigest.description: A weekly summary of care activity sent to your email.
emailDigest.premiumNote: Weekly digest is a premium feature.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.premiumDescription: You have full access to all CircleCare features.
subscription.upgradeInApp: Upgrade to Premium in the CircleCare app.
subscription.upgradeBenefit: Unlock everything CircleCare offers for your whole care circle.
subscription.orInApp: Or upgrade in the CircleCare app.
subscription.manageInApp: Manage your subscription in the CircleCare app where you purchased it.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and remove your access to all care circles. This cannot be undone.
delete.confirmBody: This permanently deletes your account and removes you from every care circle. This action cannot be undone.
